$comment: Per-repo OIDC allowlist for ingest step 2 (DR-035 B1).
Every ingest worker verifies the source CI run's OIDC claims against this
pinned set BEFORE any bundle is verified or rendered. A mismatch on issuer,
subject, OR workflow_ref crashes the worker (fail-closed).
issuer  — the GitHub Actions OIDC issuer (fixed for all GH-hosted runners).
subjects — allowed `sub` claim values. GitHub OIDC `sub` for a tag release is
(`...:ref:refs/tags/*`) match the release-tag family; the worker
treats a single trailing `*` as a prefix match.
workflowRefs — allowed reusable-workflow refs. GitHub sets the
OPERATOR-CONFIRMABLE: where the exact release-workflow filename or ref could
not be derived from the repo at authoring time, the canonical
`release.yml@refs/heads/main` form is used as a placeholder and flagged
`operatorConfirmed: false`. Confirm against each repo's actual
.github/workflows/ before first production ingest, then flip to true.
ICOS is intentionally ABSENT — struck from the supervision tree per the
cross-tier policy (DR-035). 6 repos exactly: iec, iel, iah, iaj, iar, ccp.
